title: Restrict who can view a board
excerpt:
How do i restrict which users can or can not view a board? We have very sensitive information here. 
Restricting which users can view individual columns was so easy. What about boards? Seems reasonable?

posts.author: dfurt (Daniel Furtick)
posts.cookedHtml:
How do i restrict which users can or can not view a board? We have very sensitive information here.

Restricting which users can view individual columns was so easy. What about boards? Seems reasonable?

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@dfurt,

Yes, this is very easy to do. Just change the board type to “private” (or shared).
quick video
